metadata.notes: Two replacement questions proposed for the atomic benchmark to replace PF2E-nonportable items. This batch is probe-only and intentionally leaves gold empty so we can inspect top hits across rule systems.

queries.question: How can characters act outside their turn, and what triggers or limits those actions?
queries.notes: Replacement candidate for morale/reaction-roll portability slot.

queries.question: Outside combat, how does the game structure exploration time and transition into encounters?
queries.notes: Replacement candidate for wandering-monster exploration slot.
